description_long: This object consists of a classic Sony portable cassette player and a matching audio cassette tape. The cassette player is rectangular, predominantly black, with a glossy finish and a transparent window revealing the tape inside. The front of the player features the Sony logo and a diagonal window, while the side has several physical control buttons and a headphone jack. The cassette tape is made of translucent brownish plastic with visible reels and a label area for writing. The tape is shown partially outside the player, suggesting it can be inserted or removed. This set evokes a retro aesthetic, typical of portable music devices from the late 20th century.
description: A black Sony portable cassette player with a matching translucent cassette tape, featuring physical buttons and a clear window. The set has a retro, glossy finish and visible tape reels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Sony logo, transparent window, and cassette tape partially outside the player.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thickness of both the player and the cassette, with visible control buttons.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid black back of the player and the back of the cassette tape.
description_view_3: Side profile emphasizing the slimness of the player and the cassette's edge.
